summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of AI-First Consulting portfolio website. All backend APIs and frontend features working correctly including contact forms, appointment booking, AI chat integration, and multi-language support.
passed_tests: Contact form submission (POST /api/contact) - MOCKED email integration working
Homepage loads with hero section, features, and CTA buttons
Navigation works for all 6 pages (Home, About, Projects, Contact, Consultation, AI App)
Contact page form submission and success message display
Consultation page with date picker and time slot selection
Complete appointment booking flow with success confirmation
AI Chat widget opens/closes and responds correctly
Language switcher works for EN, ES, DE, PT-BR
Projects page displays all 7 projects with external links
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (6/6 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all features working)
